# Curated overrides for food loss and waste fractions.
# These take precedence over the SDG-12.3.1- and FBS-derived defaults computed
# by `prepare_food_loss_waste.py`. Use them when there is a better-sourced
# country-specific or commodity-specific estimate available
# default pipeline is known to under- or over-estimate the gap between FAO
# food supply and actual ingestion.
# Schema:
#   country         ISO3 code
column2: or "*" to apply globally (to every country

column1: #                   that does not have its own override row for the same
#                   food_group). Country-specific rows take precedence over
#                   "*" rows.
#   food_group      Internal food group name (must match config.food_groups).
#   loss_fraction   Fraction (0-1) of supply lost between production and
#                   retail. Empty cell = keep the default from the pipeline.
#   waste_fraction  Fraction (0-1) of supply wasted at the consumer end
#                   (and downstream
#                   exists in the upstream supply figure). Empty cell = keep
#                   the default.
#   source          Free-form citation; required for every non-empty row.
# When both loss_fraction and waste_fraction are empty
